ops.body: Landed as 25142b7 (feat(policy): passes G and I) + b3740e5 (fix(refs): marker anchoring). NOTE: both commit cc-task trailers carry a transposed id (4289dbc…) — this comment is the authoritative link. Design change vs plan: G runs LAST after J (adversarial review proved J could truncate a diff base after G snapshotted it), so the HeadTail skip-guard and its test were removed as dead; base registration requires no-proposal-emitted + carried_ref None + >= G_MIN_BYTES. extract_refs tightened to two fully-anchored emitter shapes. Hardened via 4 codex review rounds.
